rationale: Educ. Code §29.091 establishes a competitive summer-instruction grant program funded by appropriations and donations. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions or property tax values, so increasing the §11.13(b) exemption does not conflict with this statute.
quote: A grant awarded under this section may be funded only with money appropriated for the program and any gifts, grants, or donations made to the agency that may be used for and that the commissioner applies to funding the program.
_note: No direct or indirect reference to Tax Code §11.13(b) or homestead exemptions found in this statute.
